title: capraria saxifragifolia
intro: Capraria saxifragifolia, also known as the rockbreak or rock breaker, is a plant species in the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Capraria saxifragifolia include relief from digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as pain relief from menstrual cramps and other conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
